content.en:
Pole Road East Gate.

This is one of the four portals that connect the end of the world to the Extreme Path Deep Sea, through which one can enter the Extreme Path Deep Sea.

Of course, usually this portal is closed, and it is sealed layer by layer, and it is guarded by the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm.

But on this day, the seal here was lifted.

A perfect master of the name and super came here, some were brought by the elders and powerhouses, and some came by themselves.

The super-perfect masters of the Daoless Tower followed the Lord of the Ancients here.

Soon, a large number of super-perfect controllers gathered here, tens of thousands.

But if it is compared to the super perfect master of the Extreme Deep Sea, it is too few.

After all, the Extreme Dao creatures of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, as long as they don't die, can grow to a super-perfect master.

For the Extreme Path Creatures, the Super Perfect Controller is equivalent to an adult Extreme Path Being, equivalent to an adult among the human race.

It is conceivable that there are so many Extreme Perfect Masters of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, they are simply everywhere!

It is only the descendants of those extreme creatures bloodline that it is difficult to grow to the realm of super-perfect controllers.

......

At this moment, those super-perfect controllers were very nervous, after all, they would soon enter the battlefield of the Extreme Dao Genius Battle and fight with the Extreme Dao creatures.

And many of the super-perfect controllers had never even seen the Extreme Dao creatures, so they were naturally a little nervous.

They are not afraid of falling a clone of the will, but they are worried that they will not be able to gain benefits!

Because the Extreme Dao Genius Battle is also an unimaginable opportunity, if he comes out alive, there is a great hope of becoming the perfect controller of the Void Realm in the future, and it can even be said that it is one hundred percent.

Time passed slowly, and soon a white-haired young man came out of nothingness.

The moment he appeared, all the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers showed respectful expressions, and even the Ancient Lord was extremely respectful.

"I've seen the Lord of the White Night!"

"I've seen the Lord of the White Night!"

"I've seen the Lord of the White Night!"

A perfect controller of the Extreme Realm said politely.

"Hmm!"

The Lord of the White Night nodded slightly.

At this time, many super-perfect masters were curious about the identity of the Lord of the White Night.

Anyone can see that the Lord of the White Night is definitely the perfect controller of the Extreme Realm, and he is not an ordinary Extreme Perfect Controller, otherwise the other Extreme Perfect Controllers will not be extremely respectful to him, as if a junior treats his predecessor.

Now.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to spy on this Lord of the White Night, and was immediately shocked.

"Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu!"

Ye Tian actually saw the Extreme Dao Ancestor Fu from this Lord of the White Night.

He had only seen the Extreme Dao Ancestor on the Extreme Dao Creature before, but he didn't expect to see the Extreme Dao Ancestor on the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller at the End of the Realm.

"The Lord of the White Night has the Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowment, and his strength must be terrifying!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, Ye Tian copied the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu of the Lord of the White Night-the Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu of Light!

"Copy!"

Ye Tian copied this Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu in an instant, and in this way, he had three Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu.

Immediately.

Ye Tian communicated with the Lord of the Ancient Ages and asked about the Lord of the White Night.

"Lord of the Ancient Realm, what is the origin of this Lord of the White Night, it seems that the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers are very respectful!" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Ancient said: "The Lord of the White Night is the palace master of the Extreme True River Eternal Palace, and he is an incomparably ancient Extreme Realm Perfect Controller, who participated in the battle with the Extreme Dao Deep Sea, and killed three Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the beginning, but now that such a long time has passed, his strength is even more terrifying." Although I am also the perfect master of the Extreme Realm, I am far from being a match for the Lord of the White Night. Among the Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers, the strength of the Lord of the White Night can definitely be in the top ten. "

"The Lord of the White Night is so powerful!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How terrifying it was for the Extreme Perfect Controller, and the Lord of the White Night had actually killed three, no wonder these Extreme Perfect Controllers were very respectful to him.

This is the status that strength brings!

Comparatively speaking, the Lord of the Ancient should belong to the general strength of the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller.

Soon.

The Lord of the White Night spoke: "This time, the battlefield where you and others will participate in the Extreme Realm Genius Battle is set to be in the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm. This is one of the several top treasure lands located in the border area of the Extreme Dao Deep Sea and the End of the Realm, which is usually in a state of lockdown, but now it is open, and there are many resources in it, and it is also your opportunity. I won't say anything superfluous, as long as I come back alive, it's a victory. In addition, the Extreme Dao Deep Sea took out a top Extreme Dao Treasure Extreme Dao Void Mirror to show a list, which will record the killing list of the Extreme Dao Genius Battle, and there will be a total of a thousand lists. I hope that this time the kill list will have the names of the Boundary's Extremes and other perfect controllers. If anyone enters the kill list, the end of the world will give a rich reward. "

"Kill List!"

Many of the super-perfect masters are full of desire, and they want to kill this list.

But they also know very well that the super-perfect controllers of the end of the realm may not even be able to save their lives, and it is very difficult to enter the killing list.

At this moment, the east gate of the Extreme Dao released infinite light, connecting an unknown place, that is, the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm.

"The passage of the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm is opened, you can enter, after every super perfect controller enters the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm, the landing position is random, there is no law. After entering, you will not be able to leave the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm for an eternal age, and once you reach the world, you will be excluded and return here. "

After the Lord of the White Night finished speaking, he let many super-perfect masters enter it.

Whew!!!

One by one, a super-master entered the Extreme Mang Mountain Realm.

When all the super-perfect masters entered, these extreme perfect masters began to talk.

"You say this time, how many of the super-perfect controllers at the end of our realm will come out alive?"

"There were a total of thirty-six super perfect controllers who came out alive last time, right?"

"I hope there can be more this time! Otherwise, it will not look good every time!"

"This year's Super Perfect Controllers have participated in many Extreme Genius Battles, and their strength is stronger than before, so there should be hope of surviving. "

"Strength is not the most important, it still depends on luck, if you are unlucky, you will be besieged by a large number of Extreme Path creatures, no one will survive, after all, there are too many Extreme Path Creatures who are super perfect controllers!"

"They'll also fight among themselves, maybe they'll be lucky this time!"

......

"Endless Lord, I hope you can have a good result, not to mention anything else, you have to enter the killing list, in that case, our Eternal Ruins and the Daoless Tower can increase their face!"

The Lord of the Ancient Heavens secretly said.

Soon, the killing of the Extreme Dao Genius Battle really began.
